case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, VS. KYUNG SUK KIM et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
BEFORE HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AND DISSOLVED BY COURT. (212)
DECLARATION OF FRANK P. AGNOST, JR. RE OSC RE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-28-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-28-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-18-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, KYUNG SUK DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-18-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-19-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-03-2011
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
